name: Terry Sullivan, MarcoRubio.com
subject: We're lean and mean
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
Peter,
We are running this campaign the same way
Marco will run the federal government - lean and mean.
We are using your money to get the biggest
bang for the buck possible. That's why we have more money on hand
than our competitors and we're the only campaign with NO DEBT!
Just look at these numbers....

When you click here and give us a few
dollars you can rest assured that we're using them the right way.
Our numbers prove it.
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42993631:18136328491:m:3:1349778030:2898383A0B90285E382D71AFE2A2BC7A:r

No debt - no waste - lean - efficient -
effective. That's the campaign we are running. That's the way
Marco will run the federal government. Click here now and help
him do it.
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42993631:18136328491:m:3:1349778030:2898383A0B90285E382D71AFE2A2BC7A:r

Sincerely,

Terry Sullivan

Campaign Manager

Marco Rubio for President

Paid for by Marco Rubio for President

name: randhpaulmd@yahoo.com
subject: All bets are off, Fellow Conservative
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

The liberal media is doing everything it can to sweep Planned Parenthood's most recent scandal under the rug...

They know - as more is found out about our nation's leading abortion provider aborting babies and selling their body parts - the more the American people recoil in horror.

But I'm not about to let them get their way.

Earlier today, I announced I will fight to STOP ALL hardworking Americans' tax dollars from going to Planned Parenthood.

Every red cent.

But this fight could come to a head as early as next week!

**[So I must be able to count on your IMMEDIATE action](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29134189:27964937721:m:1:879035888:BF1FB26B0FFABB99B4F98235DA880149:r)**.

The good news is, if you act right away, I believe this is a fight we can not only win...

...I believe this fight will lead to a massive pro-life Republican tidal wave election in 2016 - whether our media likes it or not!

After Philadelphia abortionist Kermit Gosnell's murder trial - and news of a Texas abortionist twisting babies' heads off who were born alive - Planned Parenthood's scandal is just another example of the abortion lobby's utter radicalism.

Yet, where is our media?

Where are the tough questions and self-righteous reporters demanding to "get to the bottom of this" like they would if this was a Republican scandal?

Fellow Conservative, the first of the Republican presidential debates is set to take place in just a few weeks.

You and I both know reporters already crafting their "gotcha" questions to try and skewer conservatives for simply being conservative.

But these same "objective" media mouthpieces give Planned Parenthood and their Democrat allies a free pass?

Even after a top-ranking Planned Parenthood Executive was caught on-camera explaining how they skirt the federal ban on Partial Birth Abortion and sell aborted babies' organs?

The little reporting that has been done has only been half-hearted.

And I haven't heard a peep out of Hillary Clinton about this!

I haven't heard one member of the media discuss how Hillary Clinton admits she "admires" Planned Parenthood founder Margaret Sanger.

The woman who stated, "The most merciful thing that the large family does to one of its infant members is to kill it."

The woman who advocated mandatory government permitting to have children.

Fellow Conservative, the Abortion Lobby and their allies in Congress are the true 'extremists' in the fight over abortion.

They support killing a seven-pound baby in the womb. They support sex selection abortions.

The Democrat Party national platform even calls for lifting the federal ban on Partial Birth Abortion!

And if you can help me generate a tidal wave of support for ENDING all taxpayer funding for Planned Parenthood, they'll be no hiding these facts.

As far as I'm concerned, Planned Parenthood deserves our scorn. NOT our tax dollars.

And I'm prepared to lead this battle.

But I must have your support.

It's time the American people learned the truth about the Democrats' abortion radicalism.

With your help, I'm determined to make that happen.

**[So please sign your"Stand for Life: Defund Planned Parenthood" petition and chip in a contribution of $20.16 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29134189:27964937721:m:1:879035888:BF1FB26B0FFABB99B4F98235DA880149:r)**.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29134190:27964937721:m:1:879035888:BF1FB26B0FFABB99B4F98235DA880149:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29134191:27964937721:m:1:879035888:BF1FB26B0FFABB99B4F98235DA880149:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29134192:27964937721:m:1:879035888:BF1FB26B0FFABB99B4F98235DA880149:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29134193:27964937721:m:1:879035888:BF1FB26B0FFABB99B4F98235DA880149:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29134189:27964937721:m:1:879035888:BF1FB26B0FFABB99B4F98235DA880149:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29134189:27964937721:m:1:879035888:BF1FB26B0FFABB99B4F98235DA880149:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29134194:27964937721:m:1:879035888:BF1FB26B0FFABB99B4F98235DA880149:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29134195:27964937721:m:1:879035888:BF1FB26B0FFABB99B4F98235DA880149:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29134196:27964937721:m:1:879035888:BF1FB26B0FFABB99B4F98235DA880149:r)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

name: Team Van Hollen
subject: toxic cloud
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend,

Ever since the Citizens United ruling, Chris has fought tooth and nail to lift the toxic cloud of unlimited outside money that hangs over our elections. That's why yesterday he proposed the "Free State Pledge" to show that here in Maryland we can lead by example and take positive action to keep deep-pocketed special interests out of our state.

Elizabeth Warren pioneered this type of pledge in 2012, and even got her Republican opponent to agree that elections should be fair and transparent.

Incredibly, our opponent here in Maryland (a Democrat!) flatly rejected Chris' bold progressive proposal, despite her long-stated commitment to fighting outside money in elections.

But you can have a voice in this debate. You can send a strong message that grassroots Democrats want to draw a line in the sand against Super PACs and their shadowy networks. **Will you become a citizen co-sponsor of Chris ' pledge to ban outside spending in this election?**

[**Click here to become a citizen co-sponsor of the Free State Pledge, and help keep secret money OUT of Maryland!**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91edc/70cdc2ba/479676fe/394f23b/529449067/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/become-a-citizen-co-sponsor-of-the-free-state-pledge-?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Click+here+to+become+a+citizen+cosponsor&utm_campaign=em071515&source=em071515")
[](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91edc/70cdc2ba/479676fe/394f231/529449067/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/become-a-citizen-co-sponsor-of-the-free-state-pledge-?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=em071515&source=em071515") This pledge would block mega-millionaires and corporations from dropping unlimited sums to finance everything from TV ads to mass mailers, leaving it up to the candidates themselves to get their messages out.

Chris is proud to build on Elizabeth Warren's example, because he has always fought to roll back the worst effects of Citizens United.

**Now he needs to know that you 've got his back.**

Will you become a citizen co-sponsor today and show these outside groups that their corrosive money isn't welcome in Maryland?

**[Add your name today to become a citizen co-sponsor of the Free State Pledge, and tell outside groups this is your election, not theirs.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91edc/70cdc2ba/479676fe/394f2c6/529449067/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/become-a-citizen-co-sponsor-of-the-free-state-pledge-?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Add+your+name+today+to+become+a+citizen+&utm_campaign=em071515&source=em071515")**

Thanks,

Team Van Hollen

| Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91edc/70cdc2ba/479676fe/394f2dd/529449067/VEsC/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em071515&source=em071515") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages, please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.
